arts.ttl: Ally McCoist admits 'you are telling the truth' about Celtic in Scotland and Champions League
arts.sum: But the former striker stated ‘you are telling the truth’ about Celtic fairing well in the Champions League this season and how they are ‘by far and away’ the best team in Scotland, as he told TNT Sport. It’s a trip to Croatia for Brendan Rodgers and his players as Celtic take on Dinamo Zagreb, another rejuvenated team in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Auston Trusty tells Celtic fans why he's really here as he declares 'I want to be best defender in the WORLD'
arts.sum: Trusty won't settle for second best - literally, as he wants to follow Virgil van Dijk and become the best defender on the planet

arts.ttl: Rising Lyon star 'targeted' by Celtic as Rodgers offers glimpse inside talks with £7m man - Parkhead news bulletin
arts.sum: The Hoops are focused on Champions League action but there's always room for some transfer speculation

arts.ttl: The Champions League 'trap' Celtic won't fall into as Brendan Rodgers spots the danger hiding in Dinamo crisis
arts.sum: Rodgers warns his players of the 'danger' that comes with playing a team perceived to be in crisis

arts.ttl: Celtic issue further safety warning over 'colours' in Zagreb
arts.sum: Celtic issue further safety warning over 'colours' in Zagreb.

arts.ttl: 'Take a swipe...' Charlie Nicholas slams treatment of Celtic assistant manager John Kennedy
arts.sum: “It’s the competitive edge that he has managed to get,” said Nicholas about Rodgers keeping the bench players on their toes. But Nicholas feels there are people like assistant manager John Kennedy, who has also played a key role behind the scenes, but perhaps have been viewed differently in previous times.

arts.ttl: Celtic's 'important' Champions League message to travelling fans who have been 'targeted' at Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: To keep fans safe, Celtic have offered the latest instructions to the travelling support who have tickets for the game against Dinamo Zagreb. Celtic offer support to fans ‘targeted’ travelling to Dinamo Zagreb

arts.ttl: The major Champions League target Celtic are 'building towards'
arts.sum: The major Champions League target Brendan Rodgers' Celtic is 'building towards'.

arts.ttl: Glasgow City to host Celtic in Scottish Women's Cup
arts.sum: Glasgow City will host Celtic in the pick of the ties in the last 16 of the Scottish Women's Cup, with holders Rangers at home to Montrose.

arts.ttl: This CAN be the day Celtic win away as Brendan Rodgers issues 'no doubt' Champions League prediction
arts.sum: Rodgers' side take on Dinamo Zagreb in Croatia and he's confident they can end a long wait for a European away win
